creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Muenz from comment #0)

Committed to the head branch, thank you for the patch! 

I left out most patches from the files/ directory, which only had slight offset deviations for the sake of brevity. So the only patch which really has changed was "patch-utilities.php".

Because the release contains many bugfixes it's also a candidate for MFH'ing into the 2020Q4 branch.
